column1: Hey Sriya, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
Yea Cabo is lit fs, little more on the pricey side but its a vibe
how many ppl in your group so far?
yea thats solid! you all from the same school?
worddd that Cali energy. love it
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
okay bet. I'll send what we have and I'll add in a payment plan that splits the payments into 2. makes it a little easier for everyone
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
cool whats the best email to send to?
just sent that over lmk if it came through!
just for the Riu Santa Fe you'll need one person in each room to be 21 for check in. we also have the Tesoro option which is 18+ across the board
i'm only seeing riu santa de option
My b didnt realize it wasn't in there
just sent a reply in the thread
are these the only 2 hotel options?
for Cabo those are where most of the college students are. is there one you were lookin for in specific? I can get a quote for it
other places r saying for riu santa fe u need to only be 18+?
is there a reason it is 21+ for u guys
yea its not just us, during spring break season its a requirement they put in place for college groups. they've had some incidents in the past. its for all Riu hotels
are you all under 21? I may be able to work some things out if we have a few of you
okay yea so that'll be tough. but the Tesoro is a good option too. has a rooftop pool and its on a mariana right in the center of town
super close to the main nightclubs Squid Roe and Mandala
the ME Cabo looks like there's a buyout for that hotel for you week. we don't have access to it
is the tesoro option available for 4 nights
and does this include the diplo concert?
finding out about tesoro 4 nights and no the diplo concert is with a diff company unfort
you can always get tickets to that tho, petty sure
thank pls lmk ab the 4night options
just got it. Tesoro March 22-26, $675 per person, 3 per room
can u send me the link
I dont have a link for it since I had to pull a custom quote
is there specific info youre looking for
same items included as our other packages
and if we sign up before tmr we get the free booze cruise?
all you can eat and drink, hotel transportation, etc
yup I can still honor that deal
and how many ppl per room
if youre all ready for tonight / tomorrow I'll set up the reservation link and send it over
yes can u please do that
how much is it to reserve
and if we were to add the party package
and then for the party pass, it comes with express entry, cover charge, and open bar at Squid Roe, Mandala, and La Vaquita. we also have the open bar booze cruise
you can get these individually, or as a bundle package
we would get open bar booze cruise for free correcf
how much is the bundle package
and do you guys have an excursions packet
could we add flight to it
excursion packet no, we only handle party pass and booze cruise. excursions are handled at the hotel at the concierge desk, they have a bunch of options like ATVs and jetskis, and tours
party pass - Squid Roe $75, Vaquita $65, Mandala $65
flights will be cheaper to get on your own separately. but if you want the convenience of having it all done in one we can take a look. will def a little more
how many ppl for the reservation?
we're looking at 15 people for rn
could we add more or less
yea not really just need to know how many to start with. will do 5 rooms of 3 for now
just emailed over the reservation, added the booze cruise in there on the portal page
Sriya whats up, hows everything looking on your end?
do you have the email still with the link
do u guys have any other hotel options
did you have one in mind specifically?
squad isnt feelin Tesoro? or were y'al just curious
word all good. I have the Marina Fiesta, waiting on ME Cabo
how much is marina fiesta for 4 days
Marina fiesta package is $815 per person with the things included. 3 per room
ME Cabo is $999 per person for 4 nights and the hotel isn't all inclusive. just bed and breakfast. so youd still have to spend money on food and drink
can we go with the marina fiesta package
Yea fs, I'll get that set up first thing in the am if that's cool?
perfect and can u make it for 20 ppl
Rollin deep. Yea let's do it
we're u able to get the bill
Yo! Yea I emailed it all over did you get it
It's all set and good to go
perfect we see it thank u!!
hey checkin how'd it go y'all all good getting onto the reservation?
my friends are asking if it's the 29th?
Were there a few ppl that needed more time?
could we get it pushed till the 1st
since it's such a big group
yo! yea I got you will push it to Thursday the 1st deadline
if anyone is ready before hand its best to start getting them slotted in and reserved tho
hi! we've had a few ppl pay but we were wondering if we could extend the deadline
a lot of people have been super busy with travel
but we're doing it now since holidays over
also one of my friends says temporary reserved even though she paid
Hey what's up. Does it still say temp reserved? Which friend was it
And how much time did people need, another day?
hey just a heads up ops just lmk pricing seems to be going up on the marina fiesta rooms so we gotta get ppl settled in
thank u for the pushed deadline
yo sriya any word on the group? I se 6 of you in there
hey checkin in, ops is asking about those open rooms, did they plan on hopping in?
hi they didn't plan on doing it with u guys
we can go through with us 6
thanks so much for ur help
cool I got you thats all set
hi is there any way to extend the deadline to the end of this week for the $614
we didn't see the 14th as deadline until today
hi spiffy thanks for the update
4 of us paid but 2 of my friends r having trouble logging so they r resetting password
the payment will be in for the last 2 early tmr morning
since they r on east coast time
hey aight thanks for letting me know. what troubles are they having logging in
hey whenever you have a min, if you could have everyone upload their flight info so we can schedule airport transfers
Word, you able to log in and enter that into your accounts? There's a tab called 'flight info'
You all on the same flight?
yo Sriya what airlines is that and whats the flight number
and on the way back Y4 7911 Operated by Volaris Mexico
is that what you were looking for?
hi with everything going on, are you offering refunds for spring break travels?
Sup Sriya, at the moment there's no U.S. travel ban in place, so trips are operating as scheduled. All hotels, airlines, and vendors are operating normally

If you were looking to cancel, and have the travel protection insurance, we can walk through the cancellation process and give you the documents you need to support your claim. Anything refund related is processed exclusively through them
For groups looking to switch we're offering a discount Punta Cana package for $500 per person on a 4 night stay
Would we have to pay an extra 500 or could we switch to Punta Cana and get 300 back since we paid 814?
Ultimately your current reservation is confirmed and locked. This would be an entirely new separate reservation. Nothing from the previous would transfer to the new one
Resorts and vendors aren't allowing refunds unfortunately
If i have the go blue tours insurance
Yea so the exact amount you get back is determined directly by Travel Insured as they review your claim and purchase details. Did you get the insurance?
Gotcha. Then yea that's the best route if you want to cancel is to submit the claim for a refund
hey just lmk if you wanted to go that route and I'll walk you through the steps
hi what are they steps for that route

You want to cancel? first send an email request to me a spiffy@springbreaku.com saying you would like to cancel. I will then hve our team proceed with your cancellation and send you the documents needed to support your claim
one of the girls were going with can't go anymore
is there anyway to replace her with another girl
Unfort it's too late to make any adjustments to the reservation
and what days can we do booze cruise

yea so the booze cruise dates will be assigned / offered when you arrive! Alex, our onsite host, is going to meet you at the resort and give you a breakdown of everything you need. the nightclub venue available is Squid Roe which is a super dope spot. and then there are other excursions you can sign up for while youre there
here is Alex's number too just in case +52 624 151 5124
do we need to print the vouchers or can we show it on our phone
You can screenshot them! Phone is fine
hey Sriya sorry I missed this was offline last night. let me know when you're up and I'l shoot you a call
hey hey sorry in a meeting will call you right after
hey just left a vm lmk whens a good time to call back
Hey Alex said he can come by around 5p today. Does that work for you? Still waiting to hear back from our operations director on what we can do about the change of resorts
we're trying to do the sunset private cruise on wednesday and go jet skiing
can we get compensated for that? or have that included
ids still really hard to coordinate everything and this is extremely frustrating for us
Yea you still meeting up with Alex today? He's been in contact with the ops director and is gonna work out some things for you with discounts on the excursions / events
As for the Marina Fiesta, did they offer you any compensation when bumping you to the other hotel?
cant meet him but he told us about her skiing
they said it's in the travel companies hands
Hey so our ops director talked to Eric at the Marina Fiesta who will be able to help you out with the current situation

Are you able to shuttle to the Marina Fiesta today and ask for Eric this morning? I was told that part of the Marina Fiesta is under maintenance which is why some of their reservations got bumped to the Kadune Botique
Hey Alex was there at Marina Fiesta at 9am, were yall able to get connected with him?
